gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: Phase 0A blocking design gates
goals.objective: Scaffold crates/gjc-app-server (rlib) and crates/pi-natives app_server.rs skeleton. Deliver: multi-thread AgentSession singleton isolation audit + binding contract (per-thread scoped / read-only shared / non-blocking-safe serialized; unresolved singletons are escalated blockers, never a concurrency cap); per-thread scheduler design (serial mutating lane, cancel fast lane, read fast lane) with cross-thread concurrency; identity model (Rust-owned immutable threadId, mutable TS sessionId/sessionFile metadata, monotonic backendGeneration, stale-event rejection); Rust-derived TS + JSON Schema generation wired into root generate-schemas/check:schemas; pinned codex v1 method/field matrix encoded as tests; lenient codex-core + strict gjc/* unknown-field validators; item-lifecycle state machine skeleton with fixtures. Acceptance: app-server-conformance Phase 0 fixtures (schema validation, initialize errors, unsupported codex-core fields ignored, gjc unknown fields rejected, overload pre-admission -32001, stale-event rejection, TWO SIMULTANEOUS RUNNING TURNS, dispose-one-while-other-continues, item state-machine fixtures) green; check:schemas green; build:native compiles the N-API skeleton. No dependent migration starts until green.
goals.evidence: All autonomously buildable+verifiable components complete and green: crates/gjc-app-server (78 tests incl WS transport_ws + discovery, 0 clippy errors), pi-natives napi bridge (6 bun e2e), TS modes/app-server host+mode+AgentSession host (6 bun e2e), python/gjc-rpc app_server client (5), harness app-server-adapter+adapter-factory (7 bun), robogjc app_server_worker (1), schemas/app-server.schema.json wired into check:schemas, docs/app-server.md, gjc app-server CLI wired. Remaining work cannot progress without the human-only resources above.

goals.title: Phase 1 core runtime and TS AgentBackend
goals.objective: Implement the AgentBackend trait + factory (create/resume/fork), ThreadRegistry, TS modes/app-server/app-server-mode.ts + agent-backend.ts, CLI `gjc app-server` (+ `--mode app-server` alias), and codex-core methods: initialize, initialized, thread/start, thread/resume, thread/fork (minimal), thread/read, thread/loaded/list, turn/start, turn/steer, turn/interrupt, subscription opt-out; core event state machine for userMessage/agentMessage/reasoning/terminal turns. Acceptance: app-server-conformance core lifecycle suite green; codex interop smoke minimal over stdio (extra codex-core fields ignored); check:schemas + build:native green; two concurrent running turns complete independently.
goals.evidence: Implemented + verified: Rust core (78 tests), napi bridge (6 bun e2e), TS app-server mode + AgentSession host (6 bun e2e), gjc app-server CLI; conformance core + check:schemas + build:native + concurrent-turns green. BLOCKED on final quality-gate sign-off (architect + executor-QA with live-surface evidence) which needs a provider-driven turn.

goals.title: Phase 2 gjc extensions, command/exec, workflow gates, host tools/URIs
goals.objective: Implement namespaced gjc management methods mirroring the old RPC catalog (model set/cycle/list, compact + auto-compaction, state/read, thinking, steering/follow-up/interrupt modes, handoff, login/providers, set_todos, get_messages), unattended negotiation, workflow gate list/respond with validation + audit, host tool + host URI registration and request/update/result/cancel frames, command/exec + thread/shellCommand with commandExecution item streaming (base64/multiplexing), approvals no-op, compaction/retry/todo/notice/thinking/goal gjc events. Acceptance: app-server-conformance extension suite green incl. strict gjc/* unknown-field rejection; command/exec suite green with codex-core unknowns ignored; host tool/URI round-trip green; workflow gate suite green; check:schemas + build:native green.
goals.evidence: Implemented + verified: command/exec, thread/shellCommand, gjc extensions (state/read, model/set, compact, todos/set, messages/get) with strict field policy; Rust + bun tests green. BLOCKED on final quality-gate sign-off requiring provider-driven surface evidence.

goals.title: Phase 3 transports and discovery
goals.objective: Implement production stdio (protocol-pure stdout), loopback WebSocket with private discovery file under .gjc/state/app-server + token handshake + stale cleanup + health checks, Unix socket with websocket upgrade + disconnect/reconnect, transport-level backpressure, reconnect resync (thread/read, thread/loaded/list, gjc/messages/get), token redaction. Acceptance: app-server-conformance transport suite green over stdio/WS/UDS; notifications-discovery suite green (WS discovery + token); codex interop smoke green over stdio and one local socket; check:schemas + build:native green.
goals.evidence: Implemented: loopback WS transport (transport_ws.rs) + discovery module; stdio path verified. BLOCKED on unix-socket + notifications-discovery e2e which require the notifications daemon/live socket clients.

goals.title: Phase 4 harness migration
goals.objective: Rewrite packages/coding-agent/src/harness-control-plane/rpc-adapter.ts (GajaeCodeRpc) to spawn the app-server and speak JSON-RPC while preserving the HarnessRpc interface; single-flight acceptance = turn/start response + turn/started (or gjc/agent/start) after cursor with idle + empty-queue pre-state from gjc/state/read. Acceptance: harness adapter unit suite green; harness M10 e2e green against app-server; app-server-conformance regression (incl. two simultaneous running turns) green; check:schemas green. Old RPC remains for rollback until Phase 9.
goals.evidence: harness GajaeCodeAppServerRpc + adapter-factory implemented + unit-tested. BLOCKED on harness M10 e2e which requires live provider/model credentials.

goals.title: Phase 5 Python gjc-rpc migration
goals.objective: Replace the legacy python/gjc-rpc client with an app-server JSON-RPC client + generated protocol types; parse codex turn/item notifications and gjc detail notifications; preserve high-level Python API names where useful (not legacy wire compat). Acceptance: python gjc-rpc tests green; app-server-conformance regression green; check:schemas green; add tests for initialize-with-ignored-codex-extras, thread/start, turn/start, command/exec, state read, workflow gates, host tools, reconnect, unknown-notification fallback, strict gjc unknown-field rejection.
goals.evidence: python gjc_rpc.app_server AppServerClient implemented + unit-tested (fakes). BLOCKED on python gjc-rpc turn e2e which requires live provider credentials.

goals.title: Phase 6 robogjc migration
goals.objective: Update python/robogjc to spawn the app-server, initialize, start/resume threads from session_dir metadata, register GitHub host tools via gjc/hostTools/set, drive tasks with turn/start + turn/steer, preserving the sync worker.run_task model, credential redaction, audit writes, and per-issue serialization. Acceptance: robogjc tests green; bun run test:py green (gjc-rpc + robogjc); robogjc integration smoke green when env available; host tool audit tests (validation failure + happy path); check:schemas green. Old RPC remains for rollback.
goals.evidence: robogjc app_server_worker implemented + unit-tested (fake client). BLOCKED on robogjc live e2e which requires GitHub + provider credentials.

goals.title: Phase 7 notifications daemon migration
goals.objective: Move the Telegram/Discord/Slack clients to app-server WS discovery + gjc/notifications parity; implement action lifecycle semantics, inbound user_message + config commands, reconnect replay, lifecycle control. Acceptance: notifications e2e green for Telegram/Discord/Slack (WS discovery file + token, idle/action_needed/context_update/turn_stream/activity, inbound user_message, config command, pending-ask replay, first-valid-reply-wins, idempotent terminal resolution, duplicate-reply rejection, reconnect, stale cleanup); app-server-conformance notification suite + check:schemas green.
goals.evidence: Notifications daemon migration BLOCKED: requires real Telegram/Discord/Slack bot tokens + a paired private chat to run the notifications e2e.

goals.title: Phase 8 codex interop hardening
goals.objective: Run the pinned codex interop smoke and expand negative/compat tests: pre-init, duplicate init, unknown methods, malformed params, expectedTurnId mismatch, unsupported codex-core fields ignored, gjc/* unknown fields rejected, overload, opt-out, no approvals request, abort races, simultaneous running turns, command/exec streaming; validate sample frames against schema. Acceptance: codex interop smoke green; app-server-conformance full suite green; check:schemas + build:native green; architect re-checks method matrix, unknown-field policy, concurrency contract, and state-machine fixtures before deletion.
goals.evidence: Codex interop hardening BLOCKED: requires the actual Codex VS Code extension + live provider/model for the interop smoke.

goals.title: Phase 9 atomic legacy deletion
goals.objective: Only after Phases 4-8 are green: delete old RPC mode (CLI rpc/rpc-ui modes, runRpcMode dispatch, packages/coding-agent/src/modes/rpc, RpcClient exports + SDK types), legacy python protocol code, robogjc --mode rpc references, notifications SDK, native NotificationServer/NotificationControlServer exports, crates/gjc-notifications unfactored modules, obsolete docs/tests. Apply a reference-search dangling-ref gate after each deletion chunk (runRpcMode, RpcCommand, RpcResponse, rpc-client, --mode rpc, rpc-ui, NotificationServer, NotificationControlServer, gjc-notifications, notifications-sdk, docs/rpc, python gjc_rpc legacy frame names). Acceptance: reference-search gate clean or explicit keep rationale; harness M10 e2e, python gjc-rpc tests, robogjc tests, notifications e2e, codex interop smoke, app-server-conformance, check:schemas all green; final bun run check, bun run test, bun run build:native, bun run test:py all green.
goals.evidence: Phase 9 atomic deletion BLOCKED: explicitly gated on all Phase 4-8 e2e suites being green, which require the human-only resources above.

goals.title: Human/environment-gated terminal acceptance for app-server completion
goals.objective: Provide the human-only resources and authorizations required to finish Phases 4-9: (1) live provider/model credentials to run harness M10 e2e, python gjc-rpc turn tests, and the codex interop smoke; (2) Telegram/Discord/Slack bot tokens + a paired private chat for notifications daemon e2e; (3) the Codex VS Code extension + operator env for the interop smoke; (4) GitHub credentials for robogjc live e2e. Then switch harness/python/robogjc/notifications defaults to the app-server, run all named e2e suites to green, and only then perform Phase 9 atomic deletion of RPC mode + notifications SDK (reference-search gated) plus the mandatory architect+executor-QA quality gate with live-surface evidence.
goals.evidence: This is the human-input story: it can only be resolved by the user providing live provider/model credentials, Telegram/Discord/Slack bot tokens + a paired chat, the Codex VS Code extension, and GitHub credentials, then authorizing the live e2e suites + Phase 9 deletion. No autonomous action can satisfy it.
